title: Programmatic MIDI Sequence with MIDIPlayer
description: Engine.createMessageHolder and MIDIPlayer.flushMessageList to build a MIDI sequence programmatically. Creates note-on/note-off pairs with configurable channel, note number, velocity, position, and length using Engine.getSamplesForQuarterBeats for timing.

validation.notes: Code already guards with isEmpty() + create(4,4,1). MidiPlayer in chain 0 (MIDI processors) under the master container.

title: CSS Panel Hover Transition
description: Content.createLocalLookAndFeel with setInlineStyleSheet to style a panel using CSS gradients, borders, box-shadow, and a hover transition effect with margin animation.

validation.notes: Pure CSS LAF demo with setInlineStyleSheet and div:hover transition. Panel1 must exist for setLocalLookAndFeel to apply.

title: CSS Styled Sliders with Panel Mouse Control
description: setInlineStyleSheet with CSS variables (--bgColour, --value) to create circular styled sliders. A transparent panel overlay captures mouse events to calculate which slider to move based on position, enabling custom multi-slider interaction with setMouseCallback.

validation.notes: CSS styling with --bgColour and --value CSS variables on sliders. Panel1 acts as a transparent overlay capturing mouse events. Knobs should be stacked vertically. Panel1 must cover same area as knobs.

title: CSS Sliders with Pseudo-State and Modal Input
description: Extended CSS slider panel with setStyleSheetPseudoState for programmatic hover highlighting and Content.showModalTextInput for shift-click value entry. Combines setInlineStyleSheet with color-mix, hover transitions, and mouse callback logic for a polished multi-slider control.

validation.notes: Extends example 2 with CSS :hover pseudo-state management via setStyleSheetPseudoState and Shift+click modal text input via Content.showModalTextInput. Panel1 must be named 'Panel1' (used by parentComponent key in modal config).

title: Colorful SliderPack Background LAF
description: Engine.createGlobalScriptLookAndFeel with drawSliderPackBackground to paint each slider column with a random hue using Colours.withHue and Math.random.

validation.notes: Engine.createGlobalScriptLookAndFeel registers a global LAF. Without a SliderPack component anywhere in the interface the drawSliderPackBackground callback never fires. Add one programmatically.

title: Scriptnode Signal Visualization with Display Buffers
description: Synth.getDisplayBufferSource and getDisplayBuffer to visualize a scriptnode signal path on a panel. Uses ScriptRingBuffer.setRingBufferProperties to configure buffer length and createPath to generate a waveform path, rendered via a timer-driven paint routine.

validation.skipReason: Requires a ScriptFX module ('Script FX1') that contains a compiled scriptnode network with a peak node configured as External Display Buffer #0. Setting up the full scriptnode network (LFO -> peak -> global_cable) programmatically is not feasible for automated testing.
validation.notes: Demonstrates Synth.getDisplayBufferSource + ScriptRingBuffer.createPath for 2D signal plotting. The P1 panel is obtained via getComponent — needs a ScriptPanel named 'P1' — but the core blocker is the scriptnode network dependency.

title: Effect Band Solo Buttons
description: Synth.getEffect with setAttribute to implement exclusive band solo buttons for a multi-band ScriptFX. Clicking a button solos the selected band by toggling effect attributes; clicking again re-enables all bands.

validation.skipReason: ScriptFX1.lows/mids/highs are custom properties from a specific scriptnode network - not available on generic ScriptFX
validation.notes: Demonstrates exclusive solo-button logic with an effect. The original uses a custom ScriptFX whose script defines .lows/.mids/.highs attributes — those are unavailable without the FX script. Using numeric indices 0/1/2 against SimpleGain is functionally sufficient to demonstrate the toggle pattern.

error.errorMessage: API call with undefined parameter at index 0. Use "" or false for an inactive value.

title: Parametric EQ Interface with Filter LAF
description: Full parametric EQ UI with drawFilterPath, drawFilterDragHandle, drawAnalyserPath, drawFilterGridLines, and drawAnalyserGrid LAF functions. Shows/hides per-band parameter panels on drag handle hover. Uses arrayed component references for Type, Freq, Q, and Gain controls per band.

validation.notes: Full 8-band parametric EQ UI with 5 custom LAF functions (drawFilterPath, drawFilterDragHandle, drawAnalyserPath, drawFilterGridLines, drawAnalyserGrid). MainDragFiltFT must be a FloatingTile configured as a FilterDisplay/DraggableFilterPanel type backed by the CurveEq. The control callbacks all call an empty collective_eqWatcher_Function, so none crash. 41 components total.

title: Custom Plotter Analyser LAF
description: Content.createLocalLookAndFeel with drawAnalyserBackground and drawAnalyserPath to customize a FloatingTile plotter display. Applies gradient fills and path rendering for a Plotter linked to an LFO modulator.

validation.notes: Registers drawAnalyserBackground and drawAnalyserPath LAF functions on a programmatically created FloatingTile plotter. The LFO1 modulator provides the live data stream for the plotter. FloatingTile is created in code (Content.addFloatingTile) so it does not need a component entry.

title: Interactive Grid Selection Panel
description: Single panel implementing a clickable grid with hover highlighting using setPaintRoutine and setMouseCallback. Calculates cell index from mouse position, draws active/hover states with configurable colors, and fires setValue/changed on click.

validation.skipReason: API does not exist: Graphics.drawFittedText - not part of the HISE scripting API
validation.notes: Self-contained 4x4 clickable grid with hover highlighting, all drawn via setPaintRoutine and controlled via setMouseCallback. Panel1.data stores hover index, numCols, numRows.

title: OpenGL Shader on Panel
description: Content.createShader and g.applyShader to render an OpenGL shader on a panel. A knob controls a uniform variable via shader.setUniformData, enabling real-time parameter control of GPU-rendered graphics.

validation.notes: Content.createShader('shader') creates an empty shader object if 'shader.glsl' is not found in the project — the code compiles and runs but renders nothing visible. The uniform setUniformData call is still exercised. Shader file presence is optional for compilation testing.

title: Linked Knobs with setAttribute
description: Two knobs linked via a toggle button using setAttribute on effects instead of changed() to avoid infinite callback loops. When the link button is active, moving either knob updates both knobs and their associated SimpleGain effects.

validation.notes: Demonstrates safe knob-linking via setAttribute on effects to avoid infinite callback loops. Two SimpleGain effects in the FX chain (chain 3).

title: CPU Usage Display Panel
description: Panel timer callback with Engine.getCpuUsage and Engine.doubleToString to display real-time CPU usage. Uses setPaintRoutine with drawAlignedText and startTimer for periodic refresh.

validation.notes: Uses Engine.getCpuUsage and Engine.doubleToString inside a panel timer callback to show real-time CPU% via drawAlignedText. Reads panel's own textColour and text properties. startTimer(200) is already in the code.

title: Global Routing Cable to SliderPack
description: Engine.getGlobalRoutingManager with getCable and connectToGlobalModulator to route a macro modulator value into a SliderPack at a specific index. Uses registerCallback with SyncNotification for real-time updates.

validation.notes: Engine.getGlobalRoutingManager + getCable('Macro1') + connectToGlobalModulator('M1', true) wires the Macro1 cable to receive values from the global modulator named M1. The registered callback sets a SliderPack slider at index 4. A Constant modulator named M1 in the gain chain acts as the source.

title: Arrayed Knob to Modulator Mapping
description: Dynamic arrays of knobs and modulator targets with a single shared inline callback. Uses indexOf to resolve the knob index and iterates pitchTargets[idx] to call setIntensity on multiple Constant modulators per knob.

validation.notes: Demonstrates dynamic knob-to-modulator wiring using index arrays. PITCH_INDEXES defines knob suffixes; PITCH_TARGET_INDEXES maps each knob to a list of Constant modulator indices. Moving Pitch_a sets intensity of Constant1; Pitch_b sets Constant2/3/4; Pitch_c sets Constant5/6.

title: Rotated Text on Panel
description: g.rotate with Math.toRadians to draw vertically rotated text on a panel. Rotates -90 degrees around the panel center before calling drawAlignedText.

validation.notes: Simple g.rotate demo using Math.toRadians(-90) around panel center to draw vertically oriented text.

title: Basic Linear Slider LAF
description: Content.createLocalLookAndFeel with drawLinearSlider to render a simple horizontal slider with a rounded rectangle track and value fill using obj.value.

validation.notes: drawLinearSlider LAF only fires when the slider style is a linear variant (not rotary). Knob1 must have its style changed to 'Linear Horizontal' (or 'Linear Vertical') to trigger the registered LAF function.

title: Rotary Slider Value Text LAF
description: drawRotarySlider LAF using obj.valueAsText to display the current slider value as centered text. Shows how to access the formatted value string in a Look and Feel callback.

validation.notes: Uses obj.valueAsText in drawRotarySlider to overlay the current formatted value as centred text. Knobs use default rotary style. Note: code references Colours.whitesmoke — verify HISE supports this colour constant (standard CSS colour name).

title: Icon-Based Peak Meter LAF
description: drawMatrixPeakMeter LAF that fills an SVG icon path with opacity driven by obj.peaks[0]. Loads path data via Content.createPath and applies the LAF to a FloatingTile for a custom peak meter visualization.

validation.notes: Registers drawMatrixPeakMeter LAF that fills an SVG icon path with opacity driven by obj.peaks[0]. The icon path data is hard-coded via Content.createPath + loadFromData. FloatingTile1 must be configured as a MatrixPeakMeter to supply the obj.peaks data.

title: Transport Handler with MIDI Player Sync
description: Engine.createTransportHandler with setEnableGrid, setSyncMode, and startInternalClock to synchronize two MIDI players to a master clock. Uses setOnGridChange with AsyncNotification for grid-aligned visual updates on a panel.

validation.skipReason: Cannot assign to TimeSignature properties directly - getTimeSignature returns read-only object
validation.notes: Uses Engine.createTransportHandler with setEnableGrid, setSyncToMasterClock, setSyncMode(InternalOnly), and setOnGridChange to toggle a panel text on each grid beat. Two MidiPlayers in the MIDI processor chain (chain 0).

title: Audio-Reactive Shader Animation
description: Content.createShader with g.applyShader on a panel, driven by getCurrentLevel from a synth. A timer callback smooths the audio level with exponential decay and passes it as a uniform to the GPU shader for real-time audio visualization.

validation.notes: Content.createShader('bunny.glsl') creates an empty shader object if the file is missing — code compiles and runs but renders a blank panel. The getCurrentLevel + uniform smoothing logic is still exercised. Panel is created in code (Content.addPanel). SineWaveGenerator1 provides getCurrentLevel data.

title: Rounded Tab Button LAF with Panel Toggle
description: drawToggleButton LAF using Content.createPath with quadraticTo to draw rounded tab shapes. Active and inactive states use different corner rounding. Paired with a callback that shows/hides corresponding panels based on button index.

validation.notes: Custom tab LAF using Content.createPath with quadraticTo for rounded-corner tabs. Active tab draws a notch at the bottom; inactive tab is flat. Clicking toggles the paired panel visibility. Buttons should be set to toggle mode (radioGroup or individual toggle).

title: Slider LAF Color from ComboBox State
description: drawLinearSlider LAF using obj.id with Content.getAllComponents to resolve slider index, then reads a paired ComboBox value to determine the fill color. Calls sendRepaintMessage from the ComboBox callback to trigger a LAF refresh.

validation.notes: Uses Content.getAllComponents('Knob\d') and Content.getAllComponents('ComboBox\d') to build paired arrays. The LAF reads obj.id to find the index, then reads the paired ComboBox value to pick a fill color. Needs at least one Knob and one ComboBox with IDs matching the regex patterns. ComboBox must have 3 items (for states 0/1/2). Sliders should be in linear mode so drawLinearSlider fires.

title: Broadcaster Mouse Event Listener
description: Engine.createBroadcaster with attachToComponentMouseEvents to listen for hover events on an array of buttons. Uses Content.getAllComponents with a regex pattern and addListener to react to mouse actions.

validation.notes: Engine.createBroadcaster with attachToComponentMouseEvents and addListener to log hover events. Uses Content.getAllComponents('Button\d') so any button with an ID matching the pattern works. At least one Button needed.

title: ComboBox Lookup Object Mapping
description: JSON lookup object mapping ComboBox display items to internal values using component.getItemText() as the key. Demonstrates how to decouple the user-facing list from the actual values loaded (e.g., sample maps).

properties.items:
Animal 1
Animal 2
Animal 3
Animal 4
Animal 5
Animal 6
Animal 7
Animal 8
Animal 9
Animal 10

validation.notes: Demonstrates JSON object as lookup table keyed by getItemText() result. ComboBox1 must have items 'Animal 1' through 'Animal 10' so getItemText() returns keys that match the animals object.

title: Custom Segmented Button Panel
description: Single panel implementing a segmented button control with setPaintRoutine and setMouseCallback. Draws rounded tab segments with active state highlighting, calculates selection from mouse position, and fires setValue/changed for preset-saveable state.

validation.notes: Self-contained panel with setPaintRoutine and setMouseCallback. Draws segmented button tabs with active state. Uses setValue/changed for preset-saveable state. The paint routine reads bgColour, itemColour2, itemColour, textColour from the component properties which have sensible defaults.

title: Animated Knob Border on Hover
description: drawRotarySlider LAF with Engine.createTimerObject to animate a dot tracing the knob border on hover. Uses a state machine (xinc/yinc/xdec/ydec) with reg variables for persistent animation state across paint calls.

validation.notes: LAF drawRotarySlider with per-call reg state using !isDefined guard pattern. Uses Engine.createTimerObject inside the LAF callback to animate a dot tracing the knob border on hover. The reg variable persistence across LAF calls is valid HiseScript.

title: Rotating Blur Animation on Knob Hover
description: drawRotarySlider LAF with Engine.createTimerObject and g.rotate for a sweeping light animation on hover. Uses beginLayer/gaussianBlur/endLayer for a glow effect, with getMilliSecondsSinceCounterReset for frame-independent timing.

validation.notes: LAF drawRotarySlider with hover-triggered rotation sweep animation. Uses beginLayer/gaussianBlur/endLayer for glow effect. Speed, Degrees, Blur, Width are control knobs. Set sensible ranges: Speed 1-11, Degrees 1-360, Blur 1-20, Width 2-20.

title: Regex Search Filter from Label
description: Engine.matchesRegex with toLowerCase for case-insensitive filtering of an array from a Label control callback. Iterates the source array and pushes matching items to a result array.

validation.notes: Uses Engine.matchesRegex with toLowerCase for case-insensitive filtering. Label setControlCallback fires when text is committed. Result printed to console.

title: Global Cable with Sync and Async Callbacks
description: Engine.getGlobalRoutingManager with getCable and registerCallback demonstrating both SyncNotification (audio thread, safe for setAttribute) and AsyncNotification (UI thread) on the same cable for simultaneous gain and pan modulation.

validation.notes: Uses Engine.getGlobalRoutingManager().getCable() which creates cables on demand. Registers both SyncNotification (audio thread, setAttribute) and AsyncNotification (UI thread) callbacks on the same cable. SimpleGain needed for setAttribute calls. Cable value can be tested via REPL: rm.getCable('my_cable').setValue(0.5).

title: Display Buffer VU Meter with Timer
description: Synth.getDisplayBufferSource with getReadBuffer and getMagnitude to drive a knob as a VU meter. Configures ring buffer properties (BufferLength, NumChannels) and polls the buffer at 30Hz using Engine.createTimerObject.

validation.skipReason: Requires a ScriptFX ('Script FX1') with an active scriptnode network containing an external display buffer node. ScriptFX modules without compiled scriptnode networks cannot provide DisplayBuffer interfaces via getDisplayBuffer(0). Cannot be set up via Builder API alone.
validation.notes: Would need a scriptnode network with a peak node configured as External Display Buffer #1 inside a Script FX. Cannot be created programmatically.

title: Draggable Sticky Note with Modal Edit
description: Panel with setDraggingBounds for constrained dragging, getValue() storing an object with note text and position, and a modal panel for text editing. Uses getStringWidth to auto-size the label width, with confirm/cancel buttons and preset-saveable state.

validation.notes: Sticky note with constrained dragging via setDraggingBounds. Panel value stores an object with 'note' and 'x'/'y' position. Modal overlay panel for text editing. All UI interactions are script-driven with no file system or network calls.

title: Complete SliderPack LAF
description: All four SliderPack LAF functions — drawSliderPackBackground, drawSliderPackFlashOverlay, drawSliderPackRightClickLine, drawSliderPackTextPopup — plus drawLinearSlider for individual slider rendering. Demonstrates the complete set of callbacks needed for custom SliderPack styling.

validation.notes: Demonstrates all four SliderPack LAF callbacks: drawSliderPackBackground, drawSliderPackFlashOverlay, drawSliderPackRightClickLine, drawSliderPackTextPopup, plus drawLinearSlider for individual slider rendering.

title: Custom Value Popup Function
description: ScriptSlider.setValuePopupFunction to customize the text shown in the value popup. Returns "OFF" for a specific value and Math.round for all others.

validation.notes: Simple setValuePopupFunction example. Returns 'OFF' for value==30 and Math.round for all others. Set Knob1 range to 0-60 to make the value 30 reachable mid-range.

title: Knob Value Snapping with Broadcaster
description: Engine.createBroadcaster with attachToComponentMouseEvents to implement value snapping on a hidden source knob. Calculates the nearest snap point from a predefined frequency array using midpoint thresholds, then sets the display knob. Hides the source knob with an empty drawRotarySlider LAF.

validation.notes: Broadcaster attachToComponentMouseEvents approach to value snapping. Knob1 is the hidden drag source (rendered invisible by empty drawRotarySlider LAF), Knob2 is the display knob. Set Knob1 and Knob2 range to 75-15000 to match the snap value array.

title: Knob Value Snapping with Callback
description: Control callback approach to value snapping — a hidden source knob snaps to predefined frequency values using midpoint thresholds and mirrors to a display knob. Alternative to the broadcaster-based approach.

validation.notes: Control callback alternative to the broadcaster snapping approach. Same component layout and snap value array [75, 150, 500, 1040, 3600, 15000]. Set both knob ranges to 75-15000.

title: Knob Step Size Toggle for Snapping
description: Simplest approach to value snapping — toggles a knob between free and discrete modes by changing stepSize via a snap button. Uses a lookup array for snapped values and linear interpolation for free mode.

validation.notes: Simplest snapping approach: toggles stepSize between 1.0 (discrete) and 0.01 (free). Sets Knob1.max = v.length - 1 = 5 at init. When snap is off, uses linear interpolation across the full range.

title: XML Parameter Duplicate Detector
description: FileSystem.browse to load a Desktop.xml file, then loadAsString and split to parse widget definitions. Scans for duplicate pluginParameterName values across ScriptButton and ScriptSlider elements and reports the offending widget IDs.

validation.skipReason: Uses FileSystem.browse() which opens a modal OS file picker dialog. Cannot be tested in headless/automated context.
validation.notes: Also requires SelectedFilePath (ScriptLabel), Results (ScriptLabel), SelectXMLFile (ScriptButton), RunTest (ScriptButton). The browse callback approach requires user interaction.

title: Reorderable Effect Rack Panels
description: Draggable effect panel reordering using a state array stored in a container panel value. Prev/Next buttons swap adjacent panel positions by manipulating the state array and repositioning panels via set("x"). State is preset-saveable through the container panel.

validation.notes: State managed via Container panel getValue/setValue with an object. The Container callback fires on preset load/change to restore panel order. Prev/Next buttons swap adjacent items in the state array and reposition panels by setting 'x' property.

title: Sequenced Timer for Chained Parameter Updates
description: Panel timer with a state counter to chain three groups of effect parameter updates with controlled delays. Uses ParaEQ.BandOffset for band-indexed attribute access and prevents re-entry with a data.isRunning flag.

validation.skipReason: CurveEq attribute indices (BandOffset*band+param) exceed available bands in default config
validation.notes: Uses ParaEQ.BandOffset for indexed CurveEq band access. Uses SimpleGainer.Width and SimpleGainer.Gain — valid SimpleGain parameters. Uses Reverberate.RoomSize and Reverberate.Damping — valid SimpleReverb parameters. Panel timer chains three sequential function calls with 30ms and 50ms delays.

title: FloatingTile Data Modification via JSON
description: FloatingTile get("Data").parseAsJSON() to read and modify properties of a Keyboard floating tile at runtime. Sets the Type property and updates LowKey, then converts back with trace() to apply changes.

validation.notes: Reads FloatingTile Data property as JSON, sets Type to 'Keyboard', modifies LowKey, and writes back using trace(). FloatingTile1 should be configured as a Keyboard type in its Data property. Set Knob1 range to 0-127 for MIDI note range.

title: Viewport Table Mode with LAF
description: ScriptedViewport.setTableMode, setTableColumns, setTableRowData, and setTableCallback for a data table with text cells and action buttons. Custom drawTableCell and drawToggleButton LAF functions style the table rows and button columns.

validation.notes: Full table mode example with drawTableCell and drawToggleButton LAF, setTableColumns with Text and Button column types, setTableRowData with row objects, and setTableCallback for click/button events.

title: Table Snap Values Generator
description: Utility function that generates evenly-spaced snap values for a ScriptTable using setSnapValues. Divides the 0-1 range into equal segments based on the desired number of snaps.

validation.notes: Utility function that generates evenly-spaced snap values for a ScriptTable. Generates 20 snaps across 0-1 range.

title: Table Snap Values with Visual Grid
description: Table snap values with a panel overlay drawing vertical grid lines at each snap position. Uses a panel setValue to pass the snap array, then draws grid lines proportionally spaced across the panel width in setPaintRoutine.

validation.notes: Extends snap values example with a panel overlay drawing vertical grid lines. TableGrid panel setValue receives the snap values array and draws proportional grid lines in its paint routine.

title: Table with Grid Factory Function
description: Factory function using Content.addPanel and Content.addTable with parentComponent to create a self-contained table-with-grid widget. Dynamically creates container, grid overlay, and table components with setSnapValues and a paint routine for visual grid lines.

validation.notes: All components created dynamically via Content.addPanel and Content.addTable with parentComponent set. Factory function createTableWithGrid creates container, grid overlay, and table. No pre-existing components required. The factory uses Content.setPropertiesFromJSON for initial setup.

title: Path Follow Animation with getPointOnPath
description: Content.createPath with quadraticTo to define a curved path, then getPointOnPath with getLength to position a panel along the path driven by a knob. Draws the path on a background panel and moves a foreground panel using setPosition.

validation.notes: Draws a bezier path on pathPnl and moves Panel1 along the path based on Knob1 value. Uses Content.createPath with quadraticTo, getPointOnPath, and getLength. Panel1 should be positioned within the pathPnl area and be small (e.g. 20x20px).

title: Ring Shape Mouse Hit Detection
description: Panel setMouseCallback with Math.sqrt distance calculation to detect whether the mouse is within a donut/ring shape. Computes distance from center and checks against inner and outer radii for visual feedback.

validation.notes: Uses Math.sqrt distance calculation to detect mouse within a donut/ring shape. Outer radius 250, inner radius 200. Panel must be large enough (at least 500x500) to fit the ring. Sets panel width/height to 600 via makeFrontInterface.

title: Open Samples Folder Button
description: FileSystem.getFolder(FileSystem.Samples) with isDirectory and show() to open the samples folder in the OS file browser from a button click.

validation.notes: Uses FileSystem.getFolder(FileSystem.Samples).show() to open the samples folder in the OS file browser. Unlike FileSystem.browse(), show() is non-blocking and does not require user interaction to complete. The Samples folder will always exist in a HISE project context.

title: FFT Display Buffer Configuration
description: Complete ring buffer properties object for FFT visualization — BufferLength, WindowType, DecibelRange, UsePeakDecay, UseDecibelScale, YGamma, Decay, and UseLogarithmicFreqAxis. Applied to a Parametriq EQ display buffer via setRingBufferProperties.

validation.notes: CurveEq modules have built-in display buffers (getDisplayBuffer(0) returns the FFT display). setRingBufferProperties configures FFT analysis parameters: BufferLength, WindowType (Blackman Harris), DecibelRange, UsePeakDecay, UseDecibelScale, YGamma, Decay, UseLogarithmicFreqAxis. No UI components required — the buffer config is the example.

title: Keyboard Range from Knobs
description: Two knobs controlling the LowKey and HiKey of a Keyboard FloatingTile via get("Data").parseAsJSON() and set("Data", trace(data)). Shared setKeyboardRange function updates both properties simultaneously.

validation.notes: Reads and modifies Keyboard FloatingTile Data JSON at runtime. knbLow callback references knbHigh before its const declaration, but since the callback only fires on user interaction (after parse), knbHigh will be defined by then. Set both knobs range to 0-127. FloatingTile1 Data should include Type='Keyboard'.
